since_last: 45% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.79%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.49% · BTC -2.21% · Gold -1.43% · Nasdaq100 -0.20%. 45% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.79%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.79%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.41%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +8.71%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +8.71%, DELL +5.70%, BIDU +4.84%, AMAT +3.28%, AVAV +3.27%. Laggards: PLTR -4.46%, NOW -3.04%, SAP -3.01%, DV -2.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.60% at $151.86
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
